name: Taryn Ashford
boon: Taryn's eye for patterns proves useful — they can help you solve problems or connect you with studious contacts.
bane: Taryn withdraws entirely when trust is broken, and their silence is noticed.

name: Aurora Luna Wynterstarr
boon: Inspires you and opens social doors through her theatrical connections.
bane: Turns her flair for drama against you — rumors, public critiques, social wounds.

name: Grayson Wildemere
boon: Extensive social network and gift for navigating complex social situations.
bane: Crafts careful social wounds — polite, precisely targeted, effective.

name: Greta Gorunn
boon: Physical backup and encyclopedic historical enthusiasm that surprisingly helps with research.
bane: Loudly expresses her disappointment and has a long memory for slights.

name: Javenesh Stoutclaw
boon: Deep loyalty and honest counsel when you need it most.
bane: Withdraws trust and support in ways that reveal how much you depended on it.

name: Larine Arneza
boon: Notices things others miss; provides unexpected insights at critical moments.
bane: Her absence leaves gaps in your awareness you didn't know you had.

name: Melwythorne
boon: A subtle but persistent vitality when close; deep nature connections benefit allies.
bane: Slow, inevitable withdrawal — like winter coming. You don't notice until it's done.

name: Mina Lee
boon: Genuine energy boost to morale; an enthusiastic and visible supporter.
bane: Visibly, quietly hurt in ways that sting without requiring confrontation.

name: Nora Ann Wu
boon: Direct, honest assessment and actionable advice without social padding.
bane: Methodically outperforms you in every measurable way and lets the data speak.

name: Quentillius Antiphiun Melentor III
boon: Noble connections, resources, and loud advocacy through social channels.
bane: Weaponizes social standing — pointed public critiques and orchestrated snubs.

name: Rubina Larkingdale
boon: Fierce, vocal advocacy in print and in public debate.
bane: Editorial coverage of your failures — surgical in precision, wide in distribution.

name: Rosie Wuzfeddlims
boon: Genuine warmth and surprising competence in a crisis, especially healing.
bane: Manages to feel genuinely hurt; her attempt to forgive is harder to watch than anger.

name: Shuvadri Glittermaw
boon: Spiritual perception and calming presence; a unique kind of clarity.
bane: Her absence feels like losing something you can't quite name.

name: Tilana Kapule
boon: Philosophical depth makes her a uniquely valuable sounding board; new angles on problems.
bane: Deconstructs your assumptions in front of others with careful, methodical precision.

name: Urzmaktok Grojsh
boon: Practical competence and direct, actionable advice without wasted words.
bane: Simply stops wasting time on you — you realize how much you relied on his quiet efficiency.

name: Zanther Bowen
boon: Amplifying enthusiasm; genuine morale boost that affects your actual performance.
bane: Emotional heat that burns — not subtle, not cruel, just scorching.

name: Cadoras Damellawar
boon: Careful observation in historical and investigative contexts; notices what others miss.
bane: Stops sharing what he notices — and he notices a great deal.

name: Drazhomir Yavnak
boon: Methodical problem-solving that yields unexpected solutions.
bane: Systematically identifies and exploits inefficiencies in your approach. Impersonal. Effective.
